   172→    Public Function PLC(ByVal address As Integer) As Integer
   173→        If address >= 4400 And address <= 4411 Then
   174→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4400)
   175→        ElseIf address >= 4450 And address <= 4461 Then
   176→            Return FrmMain.PLC_VALUE(address - 4438)  ' 4450 - 12 = 4438

   183→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   184→
   185→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   186→
   187→        hexv = ""
   188→        Do While DecNum > 0
   189→
   190→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   191→
   192→            Select Case na
   193→                Case 10
   194→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   195→                Case 11
   196→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   197→                Case 12
   198→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   199→                Case 13
   200→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   201→                Case 14
   202→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   203→                Case 15
   204→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   205→                Case Else
   206→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   207→            End Select
   208→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   209→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   210→            Else
   211→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   212→                Exit Do
   213→            End If
   214→        Loop
   215→
   216→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   217→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   218→        Else
   219→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   220→        End If
   221→    End Function

  1071→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
  1072→
  1073→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
  1074→        Dim i As Integer
  1075→
  1076→        retVal = ""
  1077→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
  1078→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
  1079→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
  1080→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
  1081→                i = i + 1
  1082→            Else
  1083→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
  1084→                i = i + 3
  1085→            End If
  1086→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
  1087→        Next
  1088→        Return retVal
